subcodes.title: Suriy-i-Husayn
subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, the Rememberer, the All-Subduing, the Mighty, the Powerful, and I do testify that verily I am [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا انا الذاکر المهیمن العزیز القدیر و اشهد بانی انا
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @outward and inward meanings, @symbolism, @suffering and imprisonment, @transcendence; unknowability of God
